column3: Rumor says the city council banned all private cars starting Monday.
Fabricated memo claims election machines created phantom votes overnight.
False video says the governor closed every public library permanently.
Viral hoax says the treasury will freeze debit cards this weekend.
Official report confirmed inflation cooled in the fourth quarter.
Health department data showed measles cases declined after the campaign.
Public records show the bridge inspection was completed in March.
The finance ministry announced fuel tax revenue increased this spring.
